title: selaginella bodinieri var. omeiensis
intro: Selaginella bodinieri var. omeiensis, also known as the Omei spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, rhizomatous, terrestrial plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It is native to China and is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Selaginella bodinieri var. omeiensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
